exploration.title: Secure Document Download Proxy
openQuestions: Scope boundary — stand-alone capability packet vs fold into an existing driver/goal
Package placement — where the reusable mint+gate+seal logic lives
First slice — which origin to gate first
Token model — opaque reference vs stateless sealed token
Token cryptography (build-vs-buy) — reuse the in-repo AES-256-GCM seal vs vendor a token library
Serve boundary — existing sidecar HTTP route vs Tauri custom protocol vs IPC blob
Key custody / at-rest wrapping (vendor/auth) — reuse M365 msal-node-extensions vs adopt tauri-plugin-keyring
Backing store — extend the desktop PGlite/Drizzle runtime vs bespoke store
